decision-tree.root-question: Is the task a single-agent loop with deterministic tools?

branch.when: single_agent == true and tools_deterministic == true and iter_cap <= 15
branch.conclusion: Use ReAct loop with typed tools + cap + audit.

branch.when: single_agent == true and tools_deterministic == true and iter_cap > 15
branch.conclusion: Switch to plan-execute — long loops should be planned, not improvised.
Skip — multi-agent needs a graph framework, not ReAct.

example.trace: single_agent == true and tools_deterministic == true and iter_cap <= 15
example.p: Use ReAct loop with typed tools + cap + audit.
